---
title: The robust dynamical contribution to precipitation extremes in idealized warming
  simulations across model resolutions
pagetitle: 2014-4-1-Lu2014 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2014
author: Jian Lu, L. Ruby Leung, Qing Yang, Gang Chen, William D. Collins, Fuyu Li,
  Z. Jason Hou and Xuelei Feng
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 41, 2971--2978, doi:10.1002/2014GL059532.
recommended_citation: 'Jian Lu, L. Ruby Leung, Qing Yang, Gang Chen, William D. Collins,
  Fuyu Li, Z. Jason Hou and Xuelei Feng, 2014: The robust dynamical contribution to
  precipitation extremes in idealized warming simulations across model resolutions,
  <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 41, 2971--2978, doi:10.1002/2014GL059532.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2014GL059532
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The robust dynamical contribution to precipitation extremes in idealized warming simulations across model resolutions

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2014*

**Recommended citation:** Jian Lu, L. Ruby Leung, Qing Yang, Gang Chen, William D. Collins, Fuyu Li, Z. Jason Hou and Xuelei Feng, 2014: The robust dynamical contribution to precipitation extremes in idealized warming simulations across model resolutions, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 41, 2971--2978, doi:10.1002/2014GL059532.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/2014GL059532){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
